scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && ./.venv/bin/python -m pip install -U pip && ./.venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: npm run check-backend && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "LOCAL_DEV_MODE=true LOCAL_DEV_SKIP_UPSCALE=true npm run backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:full: npm run check-backend && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "LOCAL_DEV_MODE=true LOCAL_DEV_SKIP_UPSCALE=true npm run backend" "VITE_VERBOSE_API_LOGS=true npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:supabase: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run backend" "VITE_LOCAL_DEV_MODE=false VITE_STORAGE_ONLY=false VITE_USE_API=true VITE_VERBOSE_API_LOGS=true npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:web: node scripts/warn-frontend-only.mjs && npm run dev --prefix frontend
